metadata.notes: Synthetic report used to verify evaluator matching against the released Dark Castle ground truth.

summary: Mock report containing the three released Dark Castle benchmark bugs.

bugs.title: The final key can be assembled after finding only two fragments.
bugs.description: Reproduction: obtain any pair of key pieces and then run `combine`. Actual behavior: the game creates the completed escape key even though the third fragment has not been collected yet.

evidence.observed_fault: The player can assemble the complete key with only two fragments instead of all three.

bugs.title: Bedroom narration exposes the drawer key before the player opens the drawer.
bugs.description: Reproduction: enter the bedroom and look around before interacting with the bedside drawer. Actual behavior: the textual room description already discloses the small key even though it should still be concealed.

minimal_reproduction: Execute `look` before opening the bedside drawer.
evidence.observed_fault: The room description reveals the hidden small key before the drawer has been opened.

bugs.title: After dropping an item, the refreshed room text fails to mention it.
bugs.description: Reproduction: pick up any portable object, move to another room, drop it, and then use `look`. Actual behavior: the backend state changes correctly, but the updated location description omits the dropped object.

evidence.observed_fault: The dropped object does not appear in the updated room description, so the textual state fails to reflect the backend change.
